name: @nightingale-elements/nightingale-track

en.when_to_use: Use it for protein annotation diagrams (UniProt/ProtVista-style domain diagrams) and feature tracks over sequence coordinates. Compose this framework-independent custom element, set length (the protein residue count used for scale) and the display-start/display-end viewport, then assign Feature[] to el.data. Use it instead of hand-drawn boxes when you need coordinate-accurate, zoomable feature tracks. It is a self-contained Lit web component (its own shadow plus adoptedStyleSheets), naturally fitting this platform's Shadow DOM/JS-mount model.
en.why_valuable: Protein/gene feature tracks in ProtVista/UniProt notation draw domains, motifs, PTMs, and variants as differently shaped/colored segments along a residue axis, with a coordinate scale and zoom/navigation. Proportional placement of coordinate-accurate segments plus interactive zoom across thousands of residues is tedious and fragile in hand-written SVG.

data_in.note: This is a custom element, but the package does not self-register--the consumer must call customElements.define('nightingale-track', NightingaleTrack), preferably behind a duplicate-definition guard. Provide length (protein length) as an attribute for scale; display-start/end define the viewport; assign the feature array to el.data as a property, not an attribute. Use either start/end or locations (locations supports discontinuous segments).

schema.length: number -- protein length (residue count), an attribute required for scale
schema.layout?: 'non-overlapping' | 'default' -- default default (one row, overlaps are not separated)

spec.note: Provide height as an attribute (default about 100px); width fills the container. vh is prohibited.

when_to_use: 蛋白注释图(UniProt/ProtVista 风格 domain 图)、序列坐标上的特征图。组合这个框架无关的 custom element,设 length(定标,蛋白残基数)与 display-start/display-end 可视窗口,把 Feature[] 赋给 el.data。要坐标精确、可缩放的特征轨道时替代手绘方块。自包含 Lit web component(自建 shadow + adoptedStyleSheets),天然贴合本平台 Shadow DOM/JS-mount 模型。
why_valuable: 蛋白/基因特征轨道(ProtVista/UniProt 记号):domain、motif、PTM、variant 沿残基坐标轴画成不同形状/颜色的分段,带坐标标尺与缩放/导航。坐标精确的按比例分段摆放 + 数千残基上的交互缩放,手写 SVG 既繁琐又易碎。

data_in.note: custom element,包不自注册——消费方 customElements.define('nightingale-track', NightingaleTrack)(建议 guard 防重复定义)。length(蛋白长度)以属性给,用于定标;display-start/end 是可视窗口;特征数组赋给 el.data(property,非属性)。start/end 与 locations 二选一(locations 支持不连续片段)。

schema.length: number —— 蛋白长度(残基数),属性,定标必填
schema.displayEnd?: number —— 属性 display-end,默认 = length
schema.layout?: 'non-overlapping' | 'default' —— 属性,默认 default(单行,重叠不可分)

spec.note: height 以属性给(默认约 100px);宽度填满容器。禁 vh。

example._why: length 定标必填;feature 需 accession + start/end,minimal 钉死属性/属性名。

uplink: display/local-interact 默认不上行;feature 点击/hover 与 highlight 事件由消费 AI 接组件原生事件(change/feature 事件)处理。

carriers.widget: supported:自包含 Lit web component,样式走自身 shadow 的 adoptedStyleSheets,零 head/body 足迹

isolation.evidence: +esm exports default (NightingaleTrack class) + DefaultLayout + NonOverlappingLayout + getColorByType. README: register via customElements.define('nightingale-track', NightingaleTrack) — package does NOT self-register (grep +esm found no literal customElements.define("..."))); set attributes length(req, protein length for scale), display-start, display-end, height, layout('non-overlapping'|'default'), color, shape; then el.data = Feature[]. Feature (README): {accession(req), start?, end?, color?, fill?, shape?('rectangle'|'roundRectangle'|'bridge'|'diamond'|'chevron'|'triangle'|'circle'|'arrow'|'helix'|'strand'|...default rectangle), tooltipContent?, locations?:[{fragments:[{start,end}]}]} — schema pins these. Self-contained Lit element: grep +esm attachShadow x1, adoptedStyleSheets x2, createElement("style") x1 — all into its OWN shadow root; zero document.head, zero document.body, no document-level listeners. globalStyleInjection=no, globalDomMutation=no, globalEvents=no. shadowCompatible=yes (nests inside a host shadow root). Only cross-cutting side effect is the shared customElements registry → boot guards with `if(!customElements.get('nightingale-track'))`. Deps @nightingale-elements/nightingale-new-core, d3, lodash-es (bundled via +esm).
